name: incrust
description: Incrust — capture your screen + webcam, cut the background, composite the person over the screen, and record.

extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: Records your webcam to composite over the screen.
extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Records your microphone into the output video.
extendInfo.NSScreenCaptureUsageDescription: Captures your screen to composite the webcam over it.
